raw_consumer_statement: I booked a two bedroom apartment for one night through XXXX with XXXX adult and XXXX child ( XXXX XXXX XXXX ). I have a confirmation email confirming the reservation with the statement at the bottom of the email stating This property considers guests aged XXXX and under, at time of travel, to be children. PLEASE SEE THIS STATMENT ON PAGE XXXX, under " Guest charges and accommodation capacity '' of the " XXXX XXXX XXXX  '' Apartment manager called us the day before our reservation, accused us of lying by saying that our XXXX is a child, and refused to allow us to stay in the room. In a chat with XXXX they also said we lied, even though i have the confirmation FROM THEM that we didn't lie, and that a XXXXyo is considered a " child. '' I disputed the charge with my CitiBank credit card. They are refusing to credit me the {$590.00} even though we paid for the room for XXXX people, were not allowed to stay in the room, and were refused a refund, see " XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX  ''. CitiBank will not refund the money unless XXXX agrees to give a credit slip. The entire reason I am disputing the charge is XXXX wouldn't give me the product AND refused to give me a credit for it.
